info.name: MX100 Job Portal API
info.description:
# MX100 Job Portal API

REST API **Laravel 10+** dengan **Laravel Sanctum** (Bearer token). Prefix global: `{APP_URL}/api` — di Postman isi **`base_url`** sampai `/api` (bukan slash akhir).

**Repo:** lihat `README.md` (cara jalan) dan `planning.md` (skema DB & aturan bisnis).

---

## Variabel Postman

| Variabel | Wajib | Keterangan |
|----------|--------|------------|
| **base_url** | Ya | Contoh: `http://localhost:8000/api` atau `http://localhost:8080/api` (Docker nginx). |
| **token** | Untuk route auth | Salin dari respons `data.token`, atau jalankan **Login** / **Register** — tab **Tests** mengisi otomatis (environment + collection). |
| **job_id** | Untuk URL `.../jobs/{id}` | Ganti ke ID nyata (dari seed, atau setelah **Create job**). |

---

## Ringkasan endpoint

### Publik (tanpa Bearer)

| Method | Path | Keterangan |
|--------|------|------------|
| POST | `/v1/register` | Daftar `employer` atau `freelancer` |
| POST | `/v1/login` | Login; dapat token |

### Terproteksi (`Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`)

| Method | Path | Peran |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/v1/logout` | Semua |
| GET | `/v1/user` | Semua |
| GET | `/v1/employer/jobs` | employer / superadmin |
| POST | `/v1/employer/jobs` | employer / superadmin |
| GET | `/v1/employer/jobs/{id}` | employer / superadmin |
| PUT | `/v1/employer/jobs/{id}` | employer / superadmin |
| PATCH | `/v1/employer/jobs/{id}` | employer / superadmin |
| DELETE | `/v1/employer/jobs/{id}` | employer / superadmin |
| POST | `/v1/employer/jobs/{id}/publish` | employer / superadmin |
| GET | `/v1/employer/jobs/{id}/applications` | employer / superadmin |
| GET | `/v1/jobs` | freelancer / superadmin |
| GET | `/v1/jobs/{id}` | freelancer / superadmin |
| POST | `/v1/jobs/{id}/applications` | freelancer / superadmin |

---

## Contoh respons sukses

**Register / Login (200 atau 201)**

```json
{
  "message": "Logged in successfully.",
  "data": {
    "user": { "id": 1, "name": "...", "email": "...", "role": "employer", "created_at": "..." },
    "token": "1|xxxxxxxx",
    "token_type": "Bearer"
  }
}
```

**Me — GET /v1/user**

```json
{ "message": "OK", "data": { "id": 1, "name": "...", "email": "...", "role": "employer", "created_at": "..." } }
```

**Lowongan (satu objek)**

```json
{
  "message": "OK",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "employer_id": 2,
    "title": "...",
    "description": "...",
    "status": "published",
    "published_at": "2026-04-15T12:00:00+00:00",
    "created_at": "...",
    "updated_at": "..."
  }
}
```

**Daftar paginasi (Laravel)**

Respons memuat `data`, `links`, `meta` (dan sering `message`).

**Lamaran (JobApplication)**

`data` berisi `cover_letter`, `cv_file_path`, `cv_url` (jika ada file), `freelancer` { `id`, `name`, `email`, `role` }, `created_at`, dll.

---

## Kode status

| HTTP | Kapan |
|------|--------|
| 200 | Sukses baca/ubah |
| 201 | Register, create job, submit lamaran |
| 401 | Tanpa token / token tidak valid |
| 403 | Bukan pemilik lowongan / peran tidak cocok untuk route |
| 404 | Freelancer meminta lowongan non-published |
| 422 | Validasi gagal; login salah; sudah apply 2× ke lowongan sama |

---

## Validasi penting

- **Register:** `password` min 8 karakter, `password_confirmation` harus sama; `role` ∈ `employer` | `freelancer`.
- **Lamaran:** `cover_letter` wajib; `cv` opsional — `pdf`, `doc`, `docx`, max **5120 KB**.
- **Satu lamaran per pasangan (freelancer, lowongan)** — percobaan kedua → 422 pada field `job`.

variable.description: Default koleksi; timpa dengan environment bila diimpor.

item.name: Auth
item.description:
## Auth

Register & login **tanpa** Authorization. Endpoint lain: **Bearer {{token}}**.

Token di respons: **data.token**. Request Login/Register punya **Tests** yang menyimpan token ke environment + collection.

item.name: Register (employer)
item.description:
POST /v1/register — publik.

**Body:** name, email, password, password_confirmation (min 8), role: employer.

**201:** message, data.user, data.token, data.token_type.

**422:** validasi.

item.name: Register (freelancer)
item.description: POST /v1/register — role harus freelancer.

item.name: Login
item.description:
POST /v1/login — email, password.

**200:** data.token (Tests simpan ke token).

**422:** Invalid credentials.

item.name: Me (current user)
item.description: GET /v1/user — profil user dari token.

item.name: Logout
item.description: POST /v1/logout — revoke token saat ini.

item.name: Employer
item.description:
## Employer

Peran **employer** (atau **superadmin**). Prefix **/v1/employer**. Hanya data employer_id = user login.

item.name: List my jobs
item.description: GET /v1/employer/jobs — semua lowongan saya, paginate 15.

item.name: Create job (draft)
item.description:
POST /v1/employer/jobs — title, description required; status optional (default draft).

**201:** Job created.

item.name: Create job (published)
item.description: POST /v1/employer/jobs — status published mengisi published_at.

item.name: Get job
item.description: GET /v1/employer/jobs/{id} — 403 jika bukan milik Anda.

item.name: Update job (PATCH)
item.description:
PATCH /v1/employer/jobs/{id} — title, description, status (optional).

Draft membuat published_at null; published mengatur published_at.

item.name: Update job (PUT)
item.description: PUT /v1/employer/jobs/{id} — sama dengan PATCH di server.

item.name: Publish job
item.description: POST /v1/employer/jobs/{id}/publish — set published + published_at.

item.name: List applications (CVs) for job
item.description:
GET /v1/employer/jobs/{id}/applications — lamaran + freelancer; paginate 15.

data[]: cover_letter, cv_file_path, cv_url (jika ada), freelancer {id,name,email,role}.

item.name: Delete job
item.description: DELETE /v1/employer/jobs/{id} — hapus lowongan dan lamaran (cascade).

item.name: Freelancer
item.description:
## Freelancer

Peran **freelancer**. Path **/v1/jobs** (bukan employer). Hanya lowongan **published**.

item.name: List published jobs
item.description: GET /v1/jobs — hanya published, order published_at desc.

item.name: Get published job
item.description: GET /v1/jobs/{id} — 404 jika tidak published.

item.name: Submit application (multipart + CV)
item.description:
POST /v1/jobs/{id}/applications — multipart/form-data.

cover_letter (required). cv optional: pdf,doc,docx max 5MB.

**422:** sudah apply atau job tidak published.

item.name: Submit application (JSON, no file)
item.description:
POST /v1/jobs/{id}/applications — application/json.

Body: {"cover_letter": "..."} saja. Tanpa file upload.
